message: 🌱 Add istio: unable to drain k8s node running Istio components with PDB mission (#497)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "istio-12602-unable-to-drain-k8s-node-running-istio-components-with-pdb",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "istio: unable to drain k8s node running Istio components with PDB",
+    "description": "unable to drain k8s node running Istio components with PDB. Requested by 27+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current istio deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your istio version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n istio -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio\nhelm list -n istio 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working istio installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review istio configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant istio configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n istio -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio\nkubectl get configmap -n istio -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=istio\n```\nDeployed istio 1.1.0 RC with helm chart (not template)\n\nI would like to drain out a specific node because it needs a reboot. \nThe PODs\n```\nAnnotations:        scheduler.alpha.kubernetes.io/critical-pod:\n```\nprevents that."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for unable to drain k8s node running Istio components with PDB",
+        "description": "This is a proposal for \"fixing\": https://github.com/istio/istio/issues/12602\n\nI based the logic on what i found in `gateways/istio-egress`.\n\nThis is just a proposal, another option could be to set `defaultPodDisruptionBudget.enabled = false` in `global.yaml` or update documentation to the effect\n```yaml\nAnnotations:        scheduler.alpha.kubernetes.io/critical-pod:\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n istio -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio\nkubectl get events -n istio --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"unable to drain k8s node running Istio components with PDB\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This is a proposal for \"fixing\": https://github.com/istio/istio/issues/12602\n\nI based the logic on what i found in `gateways/istio-egress`.\n\nThis is just a proposal, another option could be to set `defaultPodDisruptionBudget.enabled = false` in `global.yaml` or update documentation to the effect that default installs must be scaled before node maintenance is possible.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Annotations:        scheduler.alpha.kubernetes.io/critical-pod:",
+        "error when evicting pod \"istio-policy-d48655744-s8ggt\" (will retry after 5s): Cannot evict pod as it would violate the pod's disruption budget.",
+        "$ kops rolling-update cluster --yes\r\n...\r\nerror when evicting pod \"istio-policy-578bcb878f-2dmlw\" (will retry after 5s): Cannot evict pod as it would violate the pod's disruption budget.\r\nerror when evicting pod \"istio-galley-84749d54b7-24qrp\" (will retry after 5s): Cannot evict pod as it would violate the pod's disruption budget.\r\nerror when evicting pod \"istio-policy-578bcb878f-2dmlw\" (will retry after 5s): Cannot evict pod as it would violate the pod's disruption budget.\r\nerror when evicting pod \"istio-galley-84749d54b7-24qrp\" (will retry after 5s): Cannot evict pod as it would violate the pod's disruption budget."
+      ]
+    }
+  },
